title: BugClear Ultra 2 Insecticide, for flowers and shrubs, Concentrate, 200 ML, Red
features: BugClear Ultra 2 Concentrate 200ML - Non Neonic Insecticide
Kills & Controls Kills & Contols Aphids, Greenflies, Blackflies, Mites, Whiteflies, Scale Insects, Mealy Bugs, Caterpillars, Lily Leaf Beetles and Leaf Hoppers.
Ideal for flowers, roses, ornamental plants and shrubs
Effective against eggs, larvae and adult stages
Enhanced effect thanks to two active ingredients

Fast and effective control Rapeseed oil kills pests by forming an oil film on the undesired insect, preventing them breathing. For indoor and outdoor plants Perfect for use in your greenhouse and conservatory, as well as outdoors on your flowerbeds. For use in organic systems Uses active ingredients derived from nature and is suitable for use in organic systems. Next page 1 Effective Bug Killer 2 Fast & Effective Control 3 For Indoor/Outdoor Plants 4 For Organic Systems Kills bugs on flowers and shrubs BugClear Ultra 2 concentrate controls aphids, spider mites, mealybugs (useful control), boxwood caterpillars (useful control), lily and leaf beetles. It is also effective against eggs, larvae and adult stages. When applied correctly, its effects can be seen within one use. Based on rapeseed oil and pyrethrins (chrysanthemum flower extract), the product is fully certified for use in organic systems. The bottle and box are made of 100% recycled material. Why should I use BugClear Ultra 2? Kills aphids, spider mites, mealybugs, caterpillars, lily and leaf beetles, boxwood caterpillars (useful control), etc. Effective against eggs, larvae and adult stages. Certified for organic use. Effects seem within 1 day. Where can I use BugClear Ultra 2? BugClear Ultra 2 is ideal for ornamental plants. Do not spray directly onto blooms. Do not treat sensitive species of floral plants with delicate foliage, e.g. cyclamens. When should I use BugClear Ultra 2? Spray at first sign of insects or symptoms, until plants are clear of pests. It is also essential to ensure comprehensive coverage of the plant surface, particularly the undersides of leaves. The best time to spray is early morning or early evening. How do I use BugClear Ultra 2? Shake the bottle well before use. Using measuring cap provided, add 7ml/1L of water. Mix and use with a pressurised sprayer immediately. Apply at rate specified on packaging for target crop. Evenly spray to wet upper and lower surfaces of leaves. Compare our range of plant pest and disease control products BugClear Ultra 2 Conc.
